title: leucas mollissima var. angustifolia
intro: Leucas mollissima var. angustifolia is a variant of the Leucas mollissima plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Leucas mollissima var. angustifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
